response.justification: Bogdan Szabo has extensive experience in software development across various domains, including embedded systems and networking, but his background is heavily skewed toward high-level languages like JavaScript, TypeScript, and D. While his C/C++ experience is minimal (only noted at National Instruments for a short period), his lack of direct experience with embedded Linux kernel modifications, security technologies (e.g., MACsec, IEEE 802.1X), or networking protocols (e.g., NETCONF, SNMP) raises concerns. Additionally, there is no evidence of native-level Japanese proficiency or direct experience with the required security and networking technologies.
strengths: Strong software development background with experience in embedded and high-performance systems
Proven ability to work in diverse technical environments and adapt to new challenges
Active open-source contributions and technical talks demonstrate deep technical engagement
concerns: Limited experience with C programming in embedded/network security contexts (only brief C/C++ exposure)
No demonstrated experience with Linux kernel modifications, security protocols (MACsec, 802.1X), or networking technologies (NETCONF, SNMP)
No evidence of native-level Japanese proficiency or direct experience in the required security domain

key_factors.factor: embedded C and Linux kernel experience
